name: 7tv-anywhere
description: Build and validation tooling for the 7TV Anywhere browser extension

scripts.check: npm run check:source && npm run check:structure && npm run test:site-rules && npm run build && npm run check:build && npm run lint:firefox
scripts.dev:firefox: npm run build && web-ext run --source-dir build/firefox
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build && npm run lint:firefox
